creator: oyvind@kebab.gaffel.nu
text:
The modules used are from the graphics/drm-kmod port.
	When going to single mode from multi-mode, with agp and
	mga modules loaded, to single mode, it unloads the mga
	module and works nicely. But when I return, loading the
	mga module create a kernel panic.

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 	Go to single-mode, return to multi-mode and it panics.
